<!-- GitHub Pages Static Site Setup -->
This is a static HTML/CSS GitHub Pages website with no build tools required.

## Project Structure
- index.html: Main landing page
- styles.css: Stylesheet
- assets/: Folder for images and other resources
- docs/: Optional documentation pages

## Development
Simply edit HTML and CSS files locally. No build step needed.

To test locally, use the "Start Local Server" task to run a simple HTTP server.

## Deployment
1. Push code to your GitHub repository
2. Go to Settings > Pages
3. Select "Deploy from a branch"
4. Choose the branch and root folder (/)
5. Site will be live at: https://yourusername.github.io/repository-name

For user site (username.github.io), deploy from main branch's root.
